tasks.title: Standardize product titles across 50K ASINs
tasks.description: Apply consistent naming convention: Brand + Model + Key Feature + Size/Color. Remove special characters and standardize capitalization.

tasks.title: Clean up duplicate product listings
tasks.description: Identify and merge duplicate listings using image hashing and title similarity. Preserve reviews and ratings.

tasks.title: Optimize product images for mobile
tasks.description: Generate responsive image variants (thumbnail, mobile, desktop). Add WebP format. Implement lazy loading markup.

tasks.title: Enhance SEO metadata for top 10K products
tasks.description: Rewrite product descriptions with keyword optimization. Add structured data (Schema.org) markup for rich snippets.

tasks.title: Validate category assignments
tasks.description: Ensure all products are in correct leaf categories. Fix miscategorized items flagged by ML model.

tasks.title: Standardize units and measurements
tasks.description: Convert all weight, dimension, and volume measurements to metric system. Add unit conversion tables.

tasks.title: Map legacy product attributes to Flipkart schema
tasks.description: Create field mapping document for 200+ product attributes. Handle nested specifications and variant products.

tasks.title: Prepare bulk upload templates
tasks.description: Generate CSV/Excel templates with validation rules for each product category.

tasks.title: Validate migrated product data in sandbox
tasks.description: Run full catalog through Flipkart sandbox environment. Identify and fix validation errors.

tasks.title: Research and catalog 5000+ beauty ingredients
tasks.description: Build comprehensive ingredient database with INCI names, common names, safety ratings, and allergen flags.

tasks.title: Tag products by skin type compatibility
tasks.description: Analyze product formulations and tag with compatible skin types (oily, dry, sensitive, combination).

tasks.title: Implement product recommendation algorithm
tasks.description: Build collaborative filtering and content-based recommendation engine for personalized product suggestions.

tasks.title: Create ingredient conflict checker
tasks.description: Warn users when mixing incompatible ingredients (e.g., retinol + vitamin C, AHA + BHA combinations).

tasks.title: Design new fashion taxonomy hierarchy
tasks.description: Create 4-level category tree for apparel, accessories, and footwear. Include style, occasion, and material facets.

tasks.title: Create universal size conversion charts
tasks.description: Standardize size labels across brands. Build size conversion tables (US/UK/EU/IN) for all apparel types.

tasks.title: Add seasonal trend tags
tasks.description: Tag products with current season and fashion trends (e.g., Summer 2024, Minimalist, Streetwear).

tasks.title: Migrate products to new taxonomy
tasks.description: Bulk recategorize 100K+ products to new structure. Preserve SEO URLs with 301 redirects.

tasks.title: Implement batch tracking system
tasks.description: Track product batches from warehouse to customer. Alert customers approaching expiry.

tasks.title: Build dynamic pricing engine
tasks.description: Implement demand-based and seasonal pricing algorithms. Integrate with promotion system.

tasks.title: Real-time inventory synchronization
tasks.description: Sync stock levels across warehouse, stores, and online every 5 minutes. Handle reservation logic.

tasks.title: Build automated document verification
tasks.description: OCR and validate GST, PAN, and business registration documents. Flag suspicious uploads.

tasks.title: Create catalog quality scoring system
tasks.description: AI-powered scoring of product listings based on image quality, description completeness, and pricing competitiveness.

tasks.title: Implement compliance validation
tasks.description: Auto-check products against FSSAI, BIS, and other regulatory requirements. Block non-compliant listings.

tasks.title: Vendor onboarding workflow automation
tasks.description: End-to-end workflow from signup to first sale. Include training modules and verification gates.

projects.title: Amazon Catalog Cleanup Q3
projects.description: Comprehensive catalog optimization project including product data cleansing, image standardization, SEO enhancement, and inventory synchronization across multiple marketplaces. Focus on improving product discoverability and conversion rates.

projects.title: Flipkart Content Migration
projects.description: Migrate and enhance product listings from legacy systems to Flipkart platform. Includes content rewriting, attribute mapping, and quality assurance testing.

projects.title: Nykaa Beauty Product Database
projects.description: Build comprehensive beauty product database with ingredient analysis, skin type compatibility, and personalized recommendation engine integration.

projects.title: Myntra Fashion Taxonomy Restructure
projects.description: Restructure fashion product categorization for better search and discovery. Includes size standardization, color normalization, and trend-based tagging.

projects.title: BigBasket Grocery Data Pipeline
projects.description: End-to-end data pipeline for grocery catalog including expiry tracking, seasonal pricing, and real-time inventory integration.

projects.title: JioMart Vendor Onboarding System
projects.description: Develop and implement vendor onboarding workflow with automated document verification, catalog quality checks, and compliance validation.

jobs.title: Data Entry Job
jobs.description: A Data Entry Operator is responsible for accurately entering, updating, and maintaining data in computer systems and databases. This role requires strong attention to detail, fast typing skills, and the ability to handle large volumes of information efficiently.
jobs.requirements:
Good typing speed and accuracy
Basic knowledge of computers and software (MS Excel, Word, etc.)
Attention to detail and organizational skills
Ability to work independently and meet deadlines
Basic communication skills
jobs.responsibilities:
Enter and update data in databases and systems with high accuracy
Verify data by comparing it with source documents
Review and correct errors to ensure data quality
Maintain confidentiality of sensitive information
Organize and manage files and records for easy access
Generate reports and summaries as required
Perform regular data backups to ensure data safety
Coordinate with team members to collect and manage information

email_templates.name: Task assigned
email_templates.subject: New task assigned: {{task_title}}
email_templates.body_html:
Hi {{employee_name}},

A new task has been assigned to you on Amazon Jobs Portal.

{{task_title}}
{{task_description}}
Reward: ₹{{reward_amount}} · Deadline: {{deadline}}

Open task

Or copy this link: {{task_url}}
email_templates.description: Sent when an admin assigns a new task to an employee.

email_templates.name: Task due soon
email_templates.subject: Reminder: "{{task_title}}" is due soon
email_templates.body_html:
Hi {{employee_name}},

This is a friendly reminder that your task {{task_title}} is due on {{deadline}}.

Reward on approval: ₹{{reward_amount}}

Open task

Sign in to submit your work or request more time.
email_templates.description: Sent automatically when a task deadline is within 24 hours.

email_templates.name: Task overdue
email_templates.subject: Overdue: {{task_title}}
email_templates.body_html:
Hi {{employee_name}},

Your task {{task_title}} was due {{deadline}} and is now overdue. Please submit it as soon as possible.

Reward on approval: ₹{{reward_amount}}

Submit task now
email_templates.description: Sent automatically when a task passes its deadline without submission.

email_templates.name: KYC — documents submitted
email_templates.subject: KYC received — under review
email_templates.body_html:
Hi {{employee_name}},

Thanks — we've received your KYC submission and your security deposit payment.

Our team will verify your documents within 24 hours and email you with the outcome.

Payment reference: {{payment_reference}}
email_templates.description: Sent when an employee completes KYC submission with payment.

email_templates.name: KYC — fee paid
email_templates.subject: Payment received for KYC verification
email_templates.body_html:
Hi {{employee_name}},

We've received your KYC processing fee of ${{fee_amount}}. Your submission will move into review shortly.

Payment reference: {{payment_reference}}
email_templates.description: Sent when the KYC fee payment is recorded.

email_templates.name: KYC — review in progress
email_templates.subject: Your KYC is now in review
email_templates.body_html:
Hi {{employee_name}},

An admin has started reviewing your KYC documents. You'll receive another email shortly with the final decision.
email_templates.description: Sent when an admin opens the submission for active review.

email_templates.name: KYC — approved
email_templates.subject: Your KYC has been approved 🎉
email_templates.body_html:
Hi {{employee_name}},

Great news — your KYC verification has been approved. You can now request withdrawals from the dashboard.

Go to dashboard
email_templates.description: Sent when the admin approves the KYC submission.

email_templates.name: KYC — rejected
email_templates.subject: Update on your KYC submission
email_templates.body_html:
Hi {{employee_name}},

Unfortunately your KYC submission was not approved. Please review the note below, correct any issues, and resubmit.

Reason:
{{admin_notes}}

Resubmit KYC
email_templates.description: Sent when an admin rejects the KYC submission.

email_templates.name: Module assigned
email_templates.subject: You've been assigned to {{module_title}} on {{project_title}}
email_templates.body_html:
Hi {{employee_name}},

You've been added to the {{module_title}} module of project {{project_title}}.

{{module_description}}

Open project

Good luck!
email_templates.description: Sent when an admin assigns an employee to a project module.

email_templates.name: Task comment added
email_templates.subject: New comment on "{{task_title}}"
email_templates.body_html:
Hi {{employee_name}},

{{author_name}} commented on your task {{task_title}}:

{{comment_body}}

View task
email_templates.description: Sent when someone leaves a comment on a task you're part of.

email_templates.name: Changes requested
email_templates.subject: Changes requested on "{{task_title}}"
email_templates.body_html:
Hi {{employee_name}},

Your reviewer has requested changes on {{task_title}}.

Feedback:
{{review_notes}}

The task is back in your queue — make the updates and resubmit when ready.

Open task
email_templates.description: Sent when an admin requests changes on a submitted task.
